title: Multi-Level Scenes
description: Group scenes from a folder into a single multi-level composite scene. Each floor is identified by a trailing number in the scene name (00, 01, 02...). Includes a stairs rectangle tool to move tokens between floors and a building rectangle so tokens outside see the roof (top floor). / Raggruppa le scene di una cartella in un'unica scena multi-livello con tool per scale ed edificio.
